title: Re:Zero Experience
description: Magic, Authorities, Divine Protections, Characters and more, all in one Re:Zero mod.
body:
[Discord Server!](https://discord.gg/JKPzkwD9)

Join the discord to report bugs, ask for help, make suggestions or even just talk to the community or developer. We're all big fans of Re:Zero!

Hello, I'm Zoomerreid. I am a solo developer. This is my first public project. Previously only available on curseforge, this mod is now on Modrinth!

In this mod, you use and encounter many features reminiscent of the Re:Zero world. You can unlock the elemental magic, either from being born with them or contracting lesser spirits to learn new ones. There are many mobs, such as the various mabeasts and significant characters from the series.

The most recent update in progress is the More Magic Update, full of many improvements and additions to the magic system. Among the new features is advanced magic, a more powerful form to provide specialization.

Current Significant Features:
- A 6 element magic system, with spells that improve the more you use them.
- Divine Protections, powerful defensive and offensive passive buffs for both magic and weaponry. Protections come in tiers, each tier defining how rare and powerful they are.
- 4 Authorities; Sloth, Greed, Gluttony, and Wrath; each granting abilities similar to those in the anime. Will soon be reworked, as many are currently outdated. If you wish to use Authorities before said rework, Greed is the best. You can obtain all of them if you wish, however.
- Bosses and helpful mobs from the anime/novel. Reinhard, Regulus Corneas, Hakugei (White Whale), Oousagi (Great Rabbit), Kurohebi (Black Serpent), Roswaal Mathers, Emilia, Wolgarm, Guiltylowe, Echidna, Petelgeuse, Earth Dragon, and lesser spirits. Each major update brings new mobs!

**Return by Death is not yet implemented. It may come in the future. If you want this feature, join the discord and suggest it! The more suggestions for a feature, the more likely it will be added.**

There is a wiki linked to this page. It contains basic information to help new players with features. In addition, make sure to check the keybinds before playing and change them approprietly to your preferences. The keybinds are intuitive, but there's a decent amount of them. Many are optional and/or aren't necessary for each player. For instance, a Divine Protection user will never need access to keybinds for Authorities (Authority users can't have Divine Protections).
